description: Implement ledger router and ledger writer components with next actor governance contract as per roadmap item 11. Create governance/ledger_router.yaml and governance/ledger_writer_contract.yaml to establish routing logic, writer path definitions, and next actor selection governance rules.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed item 10 (UNIVERSAL-EXECUTOR-AUDITOR-EXCHANGE-LEDGER-LOOP) to next sequential item 11 (LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT)
